title: fix: update LTX-2 registry to LTX-2.3
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: LTX hits version 2.3
gist.blurb: We bumped the LTX video model to 2.3 and strapped it to some fresh GH200 hardware. Your moving pixels should be moving a little nicer now.
gist.summary: Updated the LTX video model registry to version 2.3 and migrated its infrastructure to run on upgraded GH200 hardware.
gist.impact: Video generation requests using the LTX model will now route to the upgraded 2.3 version on faster hardware.
gist.visual_concept: LTX is a video generation model, and it's getting a hardware upgrade (GH200). Visual: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot upgrading a retro film projector or video rendering machine with a shiny new glowing computer chip.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, helping a chunky monitor-headed robot install a glowing new computer chip into a retro video rendering machine. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
